chosen: Contrarian brand POV: a low close rate is usually a follow-up speed problem, not a sales-team problem, reframing blame from people to systems
rejected: Reviews matter less than response speed for building trust (weaker actionability without new data)
Doubling ad spend without fixing follow-up wastes money (too close to a previously shipped angle)
You don't have a marketing problem, you have a follow-up problem (overused core theme, not fresh POV)
